reviews.review_description:
They got me.  Nice job.  First time I've been ripped off on the Quest Store.

Trailer is prerendered and theres no music in the game at all.  You have to "download the mp3s" presumably illegally.

developer_response.body:
In detail note NO.5  We said "5.Due to Copyright of music, we don't include music in this app. But we support custom import .mp3 into Quest and play. "  You should import music tracks into headset yourself.
If you have problem E-mail is there.  We are not lier!

reviews.review_description: Not even sure what the point was please refund me asap!!!!
this is very much not a working game.  no music.. i would like to be refunded.  get this game out of app lab.

developer_response.body:
Yes, we did said this in description.  Please read it before buy it.
"Due to Copyright of music, we don't include music tracks in this app."

reviews.review_description: I usually don't leave review. This looked like fun. Tried to follow the yt on downloading the music, there are no files to download. I want a reund!
This not a game can't even figure out how to put music like the app says please refund my money
Refund please this game did not work at all.  Can't hear the music
This app don’t have sound I need my refund assp
This app does not comes with music. Please refund
This game should be Free for the kids. refund, please.

Was nothing like the preview and did not come 
With music… smh… I want a refund ASAP

developer_response.body:
6.Due to Copyright of music, we don't include music tracks in this app. We support custom import .mp3 file songs into Quest and play. This is how to https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QfIdWHGalTY   
We said it in words here already.

reviews.review_description: Wish I had read the reviews. No music with app. Want a refund.

developer_response.body:
Yes, sure,  we don't have a button in background and click to refund.  I am sorry. 
I think we can help if you email us.

Yes, In detail note NO.5  We said "5.Due to Copyright of music, we don't include music in this app. But we support custom import .mp3 into Quest and play. "
If you have problem E-mail is there.

reviews.review_description: Did not come with music and I could not figure out how to upload was too much work not fun as advertised in intro

developer_response.body:
5.Due to Copyright of music, we don't include music in this app. But we support custom import .mp3 into Quest and play. 
See how to https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QfIdWHGalTY
Email us if you have any problem?
